title: BEM-842 process accepted protocol
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/protocols','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 00:02 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
index=load('governance/state/accepted_claude_protocol_index.json')
responses=index.get('accepted_response_paths',[]) if isinstance(index.get('accepted_response_paths',[]),list) else []
protocols=index.get('accepted_protocol_paths',[]) if isinstance(index.get('accepted_protocol_paths',[]),list) else []
if responses and protocols:
    status='accepted_artifacts_processed'
    next_action='continue implementation from agreed protocol'
    # Build a concise normalized protocol pointer file; do not duplicate full source docs.
    body='# BEM-842 | Accepted Claude/GPT Protocol Index\n\nДата: '+created+'\n\nСтатус: accepted_artifacts_processed\n\n## Accepted Claude response files\n'
    for p in responses:
        body+='- '+p+'\n'
    body+='\n## Accepted protocol files\n'
    for p in protocols:
        body+='- '+p+'\n'
    body+='\n## Validation correction\nOld validator was too narrow: it required exact `CLAUDE RESPONSE` marker. New validator accepts Claude/Internal Auditor/Клод + Decision APPROVED/CHANGE_REQUIRED/BLOCKED unless blocker markers exist.\n\n## Next\nUse accepted artifacts as source of truth and continue implementation without waiting for another Claude round unless protocol file itself says CHANGE_REQUIRED/BLOCKED.\n'
    Path('governance/protocols/BEM842_ACCEPTED_CLAUDE_GPT_PROTOCOL_INDEX.md').write_text(body)
else:
    status='accepted_artifacts_incomplete'
    next_action='re-run broad scan and show missing side; do not claim protocol absent without accepted-index evidence'
state={'bem':'BEM-842','status':status,'index_status':index.get('status'),'responses_count':len(responses),'protocols_count':len(protocols),'accepted_response_paths':responses,'accepted_protocol_paths':protocols,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem842_process_accepted_claude_protocol.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem842_process_accepted_claude_protocol.md').write_text('# BEM-842 | Process Accepted Claude Protocol | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem842_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-842'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Responses: '+str(len(responses))+sep+'Protocols: '+str(len(protocols))+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem842_process_accepted_claude_protocol','status':status,'responses_count':len(responses),'protocols_count':len(protocols),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem842_process_accepted_claude_protocol.json','governance/reports/bem842_process_accepted_claude_protocol.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem842_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if responses and protocols:
    changed.append('governance/protocols/BEM842_ACCEPTED_CLAUDE_GPT_PROTOCOL_INDEX.md')
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Read accepted Claude/protocol index and created normalized accepted protocol index if both sides are present')
"""
